name: AssetFileMetadata
description: Metadata for a file or folder in the CMS Developer File System

id.description: The full path of the file in the CMS Developer File System

name.description: The name of the file or folder

folder.description: Whether this path represents a folder (true) or file (false)

children.description: List of child files and folders (only present for folders)

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp when the file was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the file was last updated

archivedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the file was archived (if applicable)
